Kadir Has University

Directorate of Information Technologies and Digitalization

The Directorate of Information Technologies and Digitalization at Kadir Has University provides solutions for all IT needs encountered by students, academic, and administrative staff during educational and business processes.

Information Technologies

Featured Services

Explore the Microsoft 365 product family, where productivity software and cloud-based services come together.

Open

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I reset my password?

You can reset your password at

https://parola.khas.edu.tr/

. The new password is valid for all services after the process.

How do I log in to MyKHAS?

Log in to MyKHAS

here

with your corporate username and password. If you have issues, renew your password first.

How do I access KHAS Learn?

Log in to

KHAS Learn

for courses/assignments/exams. If the problem persists, report it to the Support Center.

Campus Wi-Fi (eduroam)

Select the

eduroam

network on your device and connect with your username (including KHAS email extension) + password. Step-by-step guide:

Wi-Fi guide

.

VPN from off-campus

VPN guide

for accessing internal resources externally. Your login credentials are your KHAS account.

Microsoft 365 and OneDrive

Access to Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Teams, and 1 TB OneDrive is available. Log in to web/desktop apps with your corporate account.

Printer/Printing

Install the driver, select the “pull-print” queue, and release the print at the device with your ID. Details in the Support Center.

How do I get IT support?

Email:

[email protected]

. Request and knowledge base:

Support Center

.

Email Quota/Signature

Quota is managed according to Microsoft 365 policies. For signature: Outlook:

Settings → Compose and reply

.

IMAP/SMTP

Prefer Outlook/OWA. Use Exchange/Modern Auth for other clients. Secure connection is required if IMAP/SMTP is needed.
